headline: Breaking: Major Flooding Impacts Three Counties in Ohio Valley
description: Severe weather system brings record rainfall, prompting emergency declarations across multiple counties. River levels at historic highs.

headline: City Council Approves $200M Downtown Revitalization Plan
description: After months of debate, the city council voted 7-2 to approve the largest urban renewal project in the city's history.

headline: Local School District Reports Record Graduation Rates
description: Graduation rates across the district have reached 94.2%, the highest in two decades, attributed to new mentorship programs.

headline: Tech Company Announces 500 New Jobs at Regional Headquarters
description: A major technology firm will expand its regional presence, creating 500 positions with an average salary of $85,000.

headline: Urgent: Chemical Spill Prompts Evacuation Near Industrial Park
description: Hazmat teams responding to chemical release at manufacturing facility. Residents within 2-mile radius ordered to evacuate.

headline: State Legislature Passes Landmark Education Funding Bill
description: Bipartisan legislation increases K-12 funding by $1.2 billion over five years. Governor expected to sign next week.
